Record_string.unknown_.description: Construct a type with a set of properties K of type T

Pick_PaymentSetup.Exclude_keyofPaymentSe.description: From T, pick a set of properties whose keys are in the union K

Omit_PaymentSetup.providerAccountId_.description: Construct a type with the properties of T except for those in type K.
